sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100870" key="sunorate/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνορ-ᾱτέον</orth>, <sense id="n100870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must consider together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.23</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n100870.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-έος, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be considered together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nech.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:291:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">291.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
